allow: Bash(node -e "const fs = require\(''fs''\); fs.writeFileSync\(''src/App.js'', ''// placeholder''\); console.log\(''ok''\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const content=fs.readFileSync\('src/App.js','utf8'\); const line=content.split\('\\n'\).find\(l=>l.includes\('practice.*label'\)||l.includes\(\\"'🏌\\"\) || l.includes\('Practice'\)\); const match=content.match\(/practice.*label.*'\(.+\) Practice'/\); if\(match\) { const emoji=match[1]; console.log\('emoji chars:', [...emoji].map\(c=>c.codePointAt\(0\).toString\(16\)\)\); }")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const content=fs.readFileSync\('src/App.js','utf8'\); const match=content.match\(/practice.*label.*'\(.+\) Practice'/\); if\(match\) { const emoji=match[1]; console.log\('emoji chars:', [...emoji].map\(c=>c.codePointAt\(0\).toString\(16\)\)\); }")
